---
name: 🔄 Request a Policy Update
about: Flag an existing document that needs to be revised, modernized, or updated.
title: '[UPDATE] '
labels: update-needed
assignees: ''
---

**Which document needs to be updated?**
Please provide the link to the file in this repository (e.g., `https://github.com/StudyGRC/Study-GRC-Open-Documentation/blob/main/Policies/Password-Policy.md`).

**Why does this document need to change?**
- [ ] It is outdated based on modern security practices.
- [ ] A compliance framework (NIST, SOC2, etc.) recently changed.
- [ ] The current wording is confusing or contradictory.
- [ ] Other (please explain below).

**Describe the proposed changes**
What specifically needs to be altered? (e.g., "The current policy requires 90-day password rotations. NIST guidelines now recommend dropping mandatory rotations in favor of longer passwords and MFA. We should update Section 3 to reflect this.")

**Would you like to submit the update yourself?**
- [ ] Yes, I will open a Pull Request with the changes!
- [ ] No, I'm just flagging this for the maintainers to fix.

**Additional context**
Drop any links to updated framework guidelines or industry articles here.
